notes: Cloudflare hosts the signed registry JSON but is not the authority.
The registry signer public key and these chain commitments are the repo trust roots.
A fetched registry is rejected unless its signature verifies and it matches network_id, chain_id, genesis_hash, protocol_profile_hash, and tx_index_hash.
Discovery-level verification does not grant validator authority.
This public observer testnet is resettable and non-economic.
